prompt:
Goal: Create a wide anime-style isekai reincarnation diagnosis result card set in a luminous steampunk fantasy harbor. The image should feel like a collectible visual novel result screen, with ornate typography, clockwork motifs, and a sense that a story is about to begin.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 illustration, cinematic composition, very high detail, pastel blue sky and sea, warm sunlight, crisp anime rendering.

Layout: Place a huge ornate Japanese title across the upper left: 「潮騒の歯車港」 with gold trim, blue gradient fill, decorative gears, star ornaments, swirls, and nautical-clock accents. Directly below it place the subtitle 「異世界転生 診断」 and a small English line “ISEKAI REBIRTH RESULT”. On the lower left, place one dark teal translucent information panel with a thin gold ornamental frame, small gears, corner decorations, and subtle horizontal dividers. On the right half, place the main character large in the foreground, seated or leaning among papers and clockwork parts, with a square flat skin-tone placeholder covering the face area for later customization.

Main character: A young anime girl named のぞむ, with soft brown shoulder-length hair blowing in the wind, delicate hairpins, ribbons, a white beret-like sailor hat with a small rose decoration, frilly white blouse, pale blue dress, black corset waist, brown ribbon bow at the chest, lace cuffs, gold chains, small gears, compass jewelry, and a pocket-watch accessory. She poses gracefully with one hand near her hair/hat, surrounded by fluttering white papers and ribbons. Keep the face hidden by one centered opaque square placeholder in muted peach color.

Background: A vast fantasy harbor city named 潮騒の歯車港, filled with turquoise canals, bridges, piers, white stone buildings, elegant towers, clock faces, giant gears, airship-like structures, seagulls, sails, and a bright blue sky with fluffy clouds. Include multiple brass clock mechanisms and nautical instruments on the right foreground, including a large circular gear/clock frame.

Information panel text: Use exactly 8 visible labeled entries inside the left panel. 1) 「名前： のぞむ」. 2) 「世界名： 潮騒の歯車港」. 3) 「役職： 潮路の案内人」. 4) 「世界適性： S Rank」 with “S Rank” large in gold serif letters. 5) 「帰還難易度： SS」 with “SS” large in pink-red letters. 6) 「最初のクエスト： 止まった港時計を動かす」. 7) 「運命ログ： この港は、あなたが来るのをずっと待っていた。」. 8) Bottom status line split into two small items: 「祝福率：98%」 and 「危険度：★★★☆☆」.

Visual style: Intricate Japanese light novel cover art, dreamy romantic steampunk, detailed linework, soft glow, sparkling highlights, ornate gold filigree, airy composition, high-resolution illustration. Use a color palette of sky blue, sea teal, ivory white, brass gold, blush pink, and warm brown.

Constraints: Keep all text readable and placed as described. Do not add extra result rows beyond the 8 listed entries. Do not add watermarks, logos, QR codes, or modern UI elements. Maintain the face-covering square placeholder and the fantasy harbor diagnosis-result composition.
